importer.title: Import Nodes
importer.description: Paste your Clash YAML config, subscription URL content, or proxy URIs
importer.placeholder:
Paste your configuration here...

Supported formats:
- Clash YAML (with proxies: section)
- Base64 subscription
- vmess:// / trojan:// / ss:// URIs
importer.error_invalid: No valid proxy nodes found. Please check your configuration format.

test_panel.title: Test Configuration
test_panel.description: Select test type and start testing your proxy nodes
test_panel.ping_desc: RTT, HTTP Ping, Packet Loss, GeoIP
test_panel.full_desc: All metrics including speed and ping

results_table.title: Test Results
results_table.description_empty: No results yet. Import nodes and start a test.

settings.title: Settings
settings.server_url_desc: WebSocket URL of your MiaoSpeed backend
settings.ws_path_desc: Must match the -path parameter on the server
settings.startup_token_desc: Must match the -token parameter on the server
settings.build_token_desc: Compile-time token from BUILDTOKEN.key (segments separated by |)
